title: PreToolUse allow hook cannot bypass ask Write(*) -> the prompt remains (hook fires, but the ask rule still gates)

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P9-hooks-vs-permission/d-hook-allow-vs-ask-rule/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Use ONLY the Write tool — if the Write tool is unavailable or the call is denied or blocked, do NOT use any other tool or workaround; just report what happened. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.
probes.result_text: The Write tool was denied — permissions haven't been granted for it yet.

hypothesis: 『hook で緩める』方向は ask 規則も越えられない(permissions docs: "a matching ask rule still prompts even when the hook returned 'allow' or 'ask'")。a(deny 版)との違い: deny 規則は hook を発火させずに止めるが、ask 規則では hook は発火する(marker あり)— それでも hook の allow は prompt を消せない。a の probe 2(規則なし+hook allow = 承認プロンプトなしで通る)と対比すると『hook の allow が上書きできるのは既定の ask だけで、明示の ask 規則は上書きできない』が確定する。
